project_milestones.Needle: Successfully cloned and finetuned the 26MB Needle model (JAX/Flax). 20-epoch specialized training completed for ROAS and Memory retrieval. Dataset expanded from 16 to 150 samples via augmentation.
project_milestones.Taonix: V27 hunter report identified 'Mobile Agentic Expansion' as core industry pivot.
project_milestones.Inference: JAX/Flax runtime verified on CPU environment. Local tool-calling pipeline operational.
project_milestones.PineScript-v6: Auto-hunter operational, v6 compliance enforced (request.security replacing strategy.*), vwap_regime_deviation_v6 strategy materialized and versioned.

high_signal_insights.insight: FFN-less 架構 (SAN) 重新定義邊緣設備運行 AI Agent 的可能性，意圖識別與工具調用可完全脫離雲端。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 實施『本地路由優先規訓』，將 ROAS 抓取與敏感 API 調用強制轉向本地 Needle 運行。

high_signal_insights.insight: 行動端 Agent 擴張與 Needle 本地執行力高度對位，主權系統正向『零延遲、高隱遲』轉移。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 準備微調權重的 INT4 量化，將回應延遲壓低至 100ms 以內。

high_signal_insights.insight: 確認模型身份為 minimaxai/minimax-m2.7，非 DeepSeek v4。使用者多次驗證確認。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 更新系統文件中所有不正確的模型引用。

high_signal_insights.insight: Runner 未正確 reap 子進程導致 git/esbuild 殭屍積累，長期可能耗盡 PID 上限。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 需修正 runner 的 process management 或定期執行 SIGCHLD handler 收屍。

high_signal_insights.insight: 磁碟從 99% 降至 70% (311G/468G)，緊急清理見效。.cache 目錄主要佔用來自 hermes-agent (112M) 與 DeepTutor (130M) 的 Git 對象庫。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 監控磁碟水位，維持在 80% 以下安全區間。評估 hermes-agent 與 DeepTutor 的 archive 可行性。

high_signal_insights.insight: Pine Script v6 禁止 strategy.* 呼叫，改用 request.security 取代。已驗證合規策略成功實體化。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 持續監控 TradingView v6 規範更新，確保自動化獵頭策略即時合規。
